title: Dokrik
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''Dokriks''' were small domesticated creatures that squeaked and sat on people's laps. Native to [[Cartao/Legends|Cartao]], they were pack animals.

==Appearances==
*{{InsiderCite|issue1=68|issue2=70|Hero of Cartao}} {{1stm}}
*''[[Survivor's Quest]]'' {{Ab|Survivor's Quest (unabridged audiobook)}} {{Mo}}

*<!-- 2008-12-09 -->''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]''
